member.name: T:ThunderKit.Core.Config.ImportExtension
member.summary: Base ImportExtension for building GameImport extension points

member.name: P:ThunderKit.Core.Config.ImportExtension.Name
member.summary: Name of ImportExtension, Displayed on the Import Configuration page

member.name: P:ThunderKit.Core.Config.ImportExtension.Priority
member.summary: Integer which indicates the priority at which this extension will run. Import Extensions are ordered by their priority in descending order.

member.name: T:ThunderKit.Core.Config.BlacklistProcessor
member.summary: Modify or provide assembly blacklist of filenames The blacklist is overriden by the whitelist

member.name: M:ThunderKit.Core.Config.BlacklistProcessor.Process(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Modify or provide assembly blacklist of filenames The blacklist is overriden by the whitelist
member.param: enumeration of current blacklist before processing
member.returns: true if assembly should be blacklisted, otherwise false

member.name: T:ThunderKit.Core.Config.AssemblyProcessor
member.summary: Redirect where assemblies source path

member.name: M:ThunderKit.Core.Config.AssemblyProcessor.Process(System.String)
member.summary: Redirect where an assembly should be imported from
member.param: Path to assembly currently being imported
member.returns: new path that replaces the path passed as parameter

member.name: M:ThunderKit.Core.Config.ImportAssemblies.BuildAssemblyBlacklist(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Collect list of Assemblies that should not be imported from the game. These are assemblies that would be automatically provided by Unity to the environment

member.name: M:ThunderKit.Core.Config.WhitelistProcessor.Process(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Modify or provide assembly whitelist of filenames The blacklist is overriden by the whitelist
member.param: enumeration of current whitelist before processing
member.returns: true if assembly should be whitelisted, otherwise false

member.name: M:ThunderKit.Core.Config.OptionalExecutor.Execute
member.summary: Executed after the last files and data have been imported into the project, but before

member.name: T:ThunderKit.Core.Pipelines.PipelineToolbar
member.summary: Unity 6.3+ implementation using the native Extensible Toolbar API

member.name: M:ThunderKit.Core.Utilities.PackageHelper.WriteAssemblyMetaData(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generate a unity meta file for an assembly with ThunderKit managed Guid
member.param: Path to assembly to generate meta file for
Path to write meta file to

member.name: M:ThunderKit.Core.Utilities.PackageHelper.WriteAssetMetaData(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generate a unity meta file for an asset with ThunderKit managed Guid
member.param: Path to asset to generate meta file for
Path to write meta file to

member.name: M:ThunderKit.Core.Utilities.ScriptEditorHelper.GenerateAndLoadScript(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a new script at the specified path. Type will generate with a namespace equal to the given path
member.param: Path relative to the project's Assets folder

member.name: M:ThunderKit.Core.Utilities.ScriptableHelper.SelectNewAsset``1(System.Action{``0})
member.summary: Creates and Saves a ScriptableObject of Type T allowing the user the input the name of the new asset, or cancel by pressing escape The asset will be created in one of the folowing: The selected folder The containing folder of a selected asset The Assets folder if there is no selection in the Project window
member.param: Delegate to run after asset creation process has completed

member.name: M:ThunderKit.Core.Utilities.ScriptableHelper.AssignIcon(UnityEngine.Object,UnityEngine.Texture2D)
member.summary: Assign a Texture2d as the icon for a UnityEngine.Object in the Unity Editor
member.param: Object to assign icon to
icon to assign to Object

member.name: M:ThunderKit.Core.Utilities.ScriptableHelper.SelectNewAsset(System.Type,System.Func{System.String})
member.summary: Creates and Saves a ScriptableObject of Type t The asset will be created in one of the folowing: The selected folder The containing folder of a selected asset The Assets folder if there is no selection in the Project window
member.param: Type of ScriptableObject to create
Delegate which returns a string to be assigned as the name of the new asset

member.name: M:ThunderKit.Core.Utilities.ScriptableHelper.EnsureAsset``1(System.String,System.Action{``0})
member.summary: if an Asset of Type T does not exist at assetPath, creates and saves a new asset of Type T
member.param: Path to ScriptableObject
Delegate to run after asset creation process has completed

member.name: M:ThunderKit.Core.Utilities.ScriptableHelper.FixMissingScriptSubAssets(UnityEngine.Object)
member.summary: Function used to remove a sub-asset that is missing the script reference
member.param: The main asset that holds the sub-asset

member.name: M:ThunderKit.Core.Data.PackageSource.AddPackageGroup(ThunderKit.Core.Data.PackageSource.PackageGroupInfo)
member.summary: Generates a new PackageGroup for this PackageSource
member.param: DependencyId for PackageGroup, this is used for mapping dependencies
Collection of version numbers, DependencyIds and dependencies as an array of versioned DependencyIds

member.name: M:ThunderKit.Core.Data.PackageSource.OnLoadPackages
member.summary: Loads data from data source into the current PackageSource via AddPackageGroup

member.name: M:ThunderKit.Core.Data.PackageSource.VersionIdToGroupId(System.String)
member.summary: Provides a conversion of versioned dependencyIds to group dependencyIds
member.param: Versioned Dependency Id
member.returns: Group DependencyId which dependencyId is mapped to

member.name: M:ThunderKit.Core.Data.PackageSource.OnInstallPackageFiles(ThunderKit.Core.Data.PackageVersion,System.String)
member.summary: Executes the downloading, unpacking, and placing of package files.
member.param: The version of the Package which should be installed
Root directory which files should be extracted into

member.name: M:ThunderKit.Core.UIElements.TemplateHelpers.AddEnvironmentAwareSheets(UnityEngine.UIElements.VisualElement,System.String)
member.summary: Selectively adds a set of predetermined style sheets based upon the environment Variations: templatePath
member.param: Path to UXML template file

member.name: M:SolutionPostProcessor.#cctor
member.summary: Generate a dictionary with information necessary to clean up project file Paths

member.name: M:SolutionPostProcessor.GenerateSlnProjectEntry(System.String)
member.summary: Hashes a name into a GUID to identify a project and creates an Entry that can be injectred into an Sln file to represent a new project
member.param: Name of assembly / project to be added
member.returns: A string representing a Solution Project entry

member.name: M:SolutionPostProcessor.GenerateProjectFile(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.String}})
member.summary: Creates a simple CSProj file with the most basic requirements and a single ItemGroup containing None entries for each member of
member.param: A collection of FilePaths and their Project Display Paths (linkPath)
member.returns: A String with the contents for a CSProj file as described

member.name: M:SolutionPostProcessor.GetDistinctMarkdownDocuments(System.ValueTuple{System.String,ThunderKit.Core.Data.DocumentationRoot})
member.summary: Returns an enumeration of Markdown Documents managed by a DocumentationRoot asset.
member.param: A tuple containing the path to a DocumentationRoot asset and the corresponding loaded Asset
member.returns: An enumeration of link and file paths where the link is relative to the DocumentationRoot path

member.name: M:SolutionPostProcessor.OnGeneratedSlnSolution(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Process Unity generation Solution files to add a project for ThunderKit non-code assets
member.param: Path to generated Solution File
Content of solution file generated by unity

member.name: M:SolutionPostProcessor.OnGeneratedCSProject(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Process CSProj files generated by Unity to fix local disk packages not having their folder structure
member.param: Path to generated CSProj File
Content of CSProj file generated by unity

member.name: M:SolutionPostProcessor.AdjustDocument(System.Xml.Linq.XDocument,System.String)
member.summary: Adjusts a CSProj file so that its Compile and None elements will use a link path which represents their lcoation relative to the AsmRef they are managed by
member.param: A Parsed CSProj file in XDocument format
The name of the CSProj file / assembly
